package.name: alp_perception
package.description: Alp SDK ROS 2 perception node for V2N + V2N-M1 (DEEPX DX-M1). Publishes camera frames, IMU, GNSS, battery, and DEEPX- accelerated object detections. Subscribes to control commands. Lives on top of the alp-sdk runtime so the same source compiles against V2N (no DEEPX -- DRP-AI fallback) + V2N-M1 (DEEPX primary) by swapping the Yocto MACHINE.
